title: CLAUDE.md
text: Prolfquapp R package provides command-line interface (CLI) differential expression analysis (DEA) proteomics metabolomics data. wraps prolfqua R package streamline analysis workflows core facilities. package processes outputs various quantification software (DIA-NN, MaxQuant, FragPipe, etc.) generates dynamic HTML reports quality control plots statistical results.

title: CLAUDE.md
code: # Install package from source (development mode) R CMD INSTALL .  # Build package R CMD build .  # Check package (R CMD check) R CMD check prolfquapp_*.tar.gz  # Run tests Rscript -e "devtools::test()" # or Rscript -e "testthat::test_dir('tests/testthat')"  # Run a single test file Rscript -e "testthat::test_file('tests/testthat/test-FP_DDA_combined_protein.R')"  # Generate documentation (roxygen2) Rscript -e "devtools::document()"  # Build vignettes Rscript -e "devtools::build_vignettes()"

title: CLAUDE.md
text: package installs 4 main CLI scripts inst/application/bin/:
code: # Copy shell scripts to working directory R --vanilla -e "prolfquapp::copy_shell_script(workdir = '.')"  # 1. Generate annotation template from quantification outputs ./prolfqua_dataset.sh -i data_dir/ -s DIANN -d annotation.xlsx  # 2. Generate QC report ./prolfqua_qc.sh -i data_dir/ -p ProjectName -O ordername -w WorkunitName -d annotation.xlsx -s DIANN -o output_dir  # 3. Create YAML configuration file ./prolfqua_yaml.sh -y config.yaml  # 4. Run differential expression analysis ./prolfqua_dea.sh -i data_dir/ -d annotation.xlsx -y config.yaml -w AnalysisName -s DIANN  # All scripts support --help flag ./prolfqua_dea.sh --help

title: CLAUDE.md
text: package uses R6 classes manage state orchestrate analysis: Contains nested R6 objects: ProcessingOptions, ProjectSpec, ExternalReader Manages directory structure, normalization methods, FDR thresholds Serializes /YAML reproducible analyses Reads annotation files (CSV/TSV/XLSX) Validates required columns: file/raw, group/experiment, subject/bioreplicate, control Automatically generates contrasts control column (C/T designation) Supports paired unpaired designs Parses FASTA headers extract gene names annotations Identifies contaminants (pattern: ^zz|^CON) decoys (pattern: ^REV) Provides filtering via clean() method Right-join invariant: annotation , never data filter — always right-joined LFQData. See “ProteinAnnotation annotation, filter” Important Patterns adding behavior . Aggregates peptides proteins (medpolish, lmrob, topN) Transforms data (VSN, quantile, robscale, none) Dispatches prolfqua facade short name via prolfqua::lookup_facade(). Built-facades: lm, lm_impute, lm_missing, limma, limma_impute, limma_voom, limma_voom_impute, limpa, rlm, deqms, deqms_voom, firth, lmer, ropeca. Downstream packages register via prolfqua::register_facade() — prolfquasaint registers saint .onLoad, SAINT reached way every modelling backend (.is_saint_model branches package). Computes contrasts FDR correction; thresholding delegated contrast_obj$filter_significant(FDR, diff) reads backend’s ContrastConfiguration (column names + flags). Computes IBAQ (intensity-based absolute quantification) Generates protein abundance distributions Renders R Markdown reports (QC_ProteinAbundances.Rmd, QCandSSE.Rmd)

title: CLAUDE.md
text: preprocessing system uses plugin architecture (preprocess_software.R): plugin handles: - File discovery (get_files()) - Data parsing filtering (preprocess()) - Software-specific parameters (extra_args) - Annotation template generation (dataset()) Supported software: - DIA-NN: report.tsv diann-output.tsv (q-value filtering) - MaxQuant: peptides.txt + .fasta file (LFQ intensities; proteinGroups.txt evidence.txt used preprocessor pipeline) - FragPipe: psm.txt (TMT, DIA, LFQ workflows, PeptideProphet filtering) - MSstats: MSstats-formatted input - Biognosys (BGS): BGS report format - MZMine: Metabolomics feature tables
code: prolfqua_preprocess_functions <- list(   "DIANN" = list(get_files, preprocess, extra_args, dataset),   "MAXQUANT" = list(...),   "FP_TMT" = list(...),   # etc. )

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Located inst/application/: CMD_MAKE_DATASET.R: Generates annotation template raw files CMD_QUANT_QC.R: Runs QC analysis generates HTML reports CMD_MAKE_YAML.R: Creates YAML configuration files CMD_DEA.R: Main DEA pipeline (preprocess → aggregate → model → report) CMD_DEA_Normalize.R: Normalization-focused variant scripts use optparse argument parsing logger structured logging.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: R Markdown templates render dynamic HTML reports: **_Grp2Analysis_V2.Rmd**: Main DEA report (methods, QC plots, volcano plots, results tables) **_Grp2Analysis_V2_metabo.Rmd**: Metabolomics-specific variant **_DiffExpQC.Rmd**: Differential expression QC GenericQC/QC_ProteinAbundances.Rmd: Protein abundance distributions GenericQC/QCandSSE.Rmd: Sample size estimation Reports receive data via params$GRP2 (list structure results, configurations, annotations).

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Multi-format outputs support different downstream tools: HTML reports: Human-readable results plots XLSX files: Excel-compatible tables multiple sheets Parquet files: Efficient storage normalized data matrices RDS files: R-native serialization (SummarizedExperiment objects) Rank files (.rnk): GSEA-compatible format SummarizedExperiment: Bioconductor-compatible iSEE/OmicsViewer
